mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS id, s.product_name AS productName, s.brand_number AS brandNumber, s.factory_name AS factoryName, s.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, t.total_number AS buyNumber, d1.shipper_match_user_id AS shipperUserId, d1.shipper_match_user_name AS shipperUserName, d2.shipper_match_user_id AS matchUserId, d2.shipper_match_user_name AS matchUserName, t.created_date AS createdDate FROM t_apply_internal_buy t LEFT JOIN t_apply_internal_buy_detail d1 ON d1.apply_internal_buy_id = t.id AND d1.detail_type = 'O' LEFT JOIN t_apply_internal_buy_detail d2 ON d2.apply_internal_buy_id = t.id AND d2.detail_type = 'N' LEFT JOIN t_stock_detail s ON s.id = d1.stock_detail_id WHERE t. STATUS = 'D' AND t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY t.id DESC
ORDER BY t.id ASC
ORDER BY t.id DESC
